label: Household ID
description: Unique household identifier (per round; NO panel key).

label: District ID
description: District (woreda) of the household (links to the panel).
how_created: Same district_id -> open_year map as the panel.

label: Treated dummy
description: 1 if the district ever hosts a park.

label: Treatment indicator
description: 1 if the district is treated AND survey_round >= the park's open round.
how_created: Round-level open map (modal treated district opens in the 2016 round).

label: Event phase
description: Round position relative to opening, in {-3,-2,-1,0,+1} (NaN for controls).

label: Durable goods per capita
description: Number of durable items per household member.
how_created: Linear DGP: intercept + FE + tau*treatment + kappa*X + noise.

label: Housing quality
description: 1 if the household has electricity + piped water + toilet + finished floor.
how_created: Clipped LPM (Bernoulli of a clipped linear probability).

label: DHS wealth index
description: Standardized DHS wealth index (PCA of assets), z-scored per round.

label: Household size
how_created: Normal, MILDLY correlated with treatment (control variable).
